h76d53d72g2ef0g42acgbc51gef077f6f7a43: Come on, dig! Faster! Get her out of there!
haa54cad9g2f96g4fb4gad3cg9c147832613d: Don't die, don't die, don't die...
heeb8a518g9d42g4f1ag8211ge27adf1037e7: *The person they're digging from the rubble - it's the illithid from the ship. Wounded, but still alive.*
h585c6cb0ged9fg49e2g999dg4d304462de2e: *The survivor they're trying to save - it's the ghaik from the ship.*
h03a954cbg74acg43c0g9ce1g77b2a10805de: *The mind flayer from the ship - it's taken their brittle minds for its own.*
hd3513307gcf68g4edbg8448gc35d083573e3: *The person they're trying to save... it's the creature from the ship! Still alive, but wounded.*
h1af2ba61gb59bg470cg9f51g9627fa7e4ab9: What are you doing? Let the monster die.
h47e43d40gc5a0g48ceg9cceg18e23f4ef155: You - you did this to her. I will not lose her - I will not lose her again!

h8532adc6g827dg49e7g8326g59244e35b988: ... you... you did this! You want to kill her!
hde9fe6f8g4127g4cb7g9a90g7f813105debf: Step back. I'm here to help.
h50ade741gf4a4g4895ga3adgbef7d7f6ebb4: Watch out! He's here to kill her!

he36bc51dga8f1g4f73g84c1g30a377070c35: *Your voice cuts through the fog of confusion - you can see the creature's hold on them wavering.*
ha31b6d16g5ed3g4baag99b6gc3721e6a6ac0: *As its influence wanes, they clutch their heads, blinking in confusion.*
h3ed2ea7cgd5cfg435eg87begc2f6502bbe90: *Your words fall on deaf ears - the creature's hold on them is too strong.*
